request.description: Generate song lyrics from a user prompt.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Generate song lyrics from a user prompt.

response.body:
{
  "lyrics": "[Verse 1]
Streetlights fade into the blue
I miss the last train back to you
Neon rain across the glass
A quiet city rushing past",
  "model": "gpt-5.4-mini"
}

response.name: 500 Provider Or Server Error

originalRequest.description: Generate song lyrics from a user prompt.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Midnight Drive",
  "prompt": "neon synthwave production with pulsing bass, gated drums, and a wide cinematic chorus",
  "lyrics": "City lights blur in the rearview glow\nI keep chasing echoes down an empty road\nEvery signal fades but I still hear your name\nMidnight keeps on driving me through the same old flame",
  "music_length_ms": 90000,
  "model_id": "music_v1",
  "force_instrumental": false,
  "respect_sections_durations": false,
  "user_id": null
}

request.description: Generate a song from a prompt, optionally with separate `lyrics`. Provide exactly one of `prompt` or `composition_plan`.
